privileged_info_summary: The CT Cranium (0051) is a real, publicly available dataset from InVesalius 3's official GitHub releases (v3.0). It is a CT scan of the human head (cranium/skull base region) acquired on 2002-06-04, consisting of 108 slices at 2.0mm thickness with 512x512 pixel dimensions. The dataset is downloaded from https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip (24.3 MB). The task requires creating a volume-rendered visualization of this skull data, exporting to /home/ga/Documents/volume_render_bone.png with minimum file size 100KB and minimum resolution [400, 400] pixels. All metadata claims in the task are accurate and supported by evidence from DICOM file inspection and official source URLs.
